name: Access Control
description: Implement technical policies and procedures for electronic information systems that maintain ePHI to allow access only to authorized persons or software programs
requirements: Unique user identification required for all ePHI system access
Emergency access procedure must be documented and implemented
Automatic logoff after configurable period of inactivity
Encryption and decryption mechanisms for ePHI at rest
Access to ePHI must be logged and auditable

name: Audit Controls
description: Implement hardware, software, and/or procedural mechanisms to record and examine activity in information systems that contain or use ePHI
requirements: All access to ePHI must generate audit log entries
Audit logs must include who, what, when, where, and why
Audit logs must be tamper-evident and stored securely
Regular review of audit logs must be performed
Audit log retention minimum 6 years per HIPAA requirements

name: Integrity Controls
description: Implement policies and procedures to protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction
requirements: Electronic mechanisms to corroborate that ePHI has not been altered or destroyed
Data integrity checks (checksums, hashes) for stored ePHI
Database constraints to prevent invalid data states
Backup and recovery procedures for ePHI data

name: Person or Entity Authentication
description: Implement procedures to verify that a person or entity seeking access to ePHI is the one claimed
requirements: Multi-factor authentication for ePHI system access
Identity verification before granting access to ePHI
Service-to-service authentication using mutual TLS or API keys
Password complexity requirements enforced programmatically

name: Transmission Security
description: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI being transmitted over electronic communications networks
requirements: ePHI must be encrypted during electronic transmission (TLS 1.2+)
Integrity controls for transmitted ePHI
VPN or equivalent protection for remote access to ePHI
Email containing ePHI must be encrypted

name: Security Awareness and Training
description: Implement a security awareness and training program for all members of the workforce
requirements: Security reminders provided to workforce regularly
Procedures for guarding against, detecting, and reporting malicious software
Login monitoring procedures implemented
Password management training and enforcement

name: Risk Analysis
description: Conduct an accurate and thorough assessment of the potential risks and vulnerabilities to the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of ePHI
requirements: Regular risk assessments of systems handling ePHI
Documented risk mitigation strategies
Vulnerability scanning and penetration testing
Risk assessment updates when significant changes occur
